title: "Just Trickster"
description: A small pack containing trickster and addons with a few extra essential mods
body:
A modpack for trying out [Trickster](https://modrinth.com/mod/trickster) or for using as a base to make your own pack with [Trickster](https://modrinth.com/mod/trickster).

I will try to make sure it always stays up to date with the latest version of [Trickster](https://modrinth.com/mod/trickster) and addons.

Currently not included Trickster addons:
- [Trickster Lisp](https://modrinth.com/mod/trickster-lisp) I think it doesn't fit trickster very well. But if you are someone who prefers writing their spells in more conventional form I recommend it.
- [Sibyl](https://github.com/Master-Bw3/Sibyl) Again personally not a huge fan and it might be confusing to new players. But if would like autocomplete in the spell screen I recommend it.
- [Random Acess Minds](https://modrinth.com/mod/random-access-mind): Not for the latest versions of trickster. Use the crowmind with a map instead.

For help with trickster check the tome ([online version](https://trickster.ing/)) or ask in the [Discord](https://discord.gg/WcYsDDQtyR) in #trickster
